user.title: Connect to whereiput.it
user.description: Mint a read token at whereiput.it → Settings → Integrations.

error.invalid_url: Base URL must start with http:// or https://.
error.insecure_url: http:// is only allowed for a local or private address (e.g. localhost, a .local name, or a 192.168.x.x address). Use https:// for a public host.

abort.already_configured: This server/token is already set up.

search.name: Search inventory
search.description: Find where an item is stored.
